---
title: "ledoit_wolf"
generated: true
description: "Ledoit-Wolf analytic-shrinkage covariance."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.connectivity`](../nitrix-stats-connectivity.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:ledoit_wolf -->
```python
ledoit_wolf(X: Float[Array, 'n p'], *, assume_centered: bool = False) -> Tuple[Float[Array, 'p p'], Float[Array, '']]
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:ledoit_wolf -->
Ledoit-Wolf analytic-shrinkage covariance.

Returns `(cov, shrinkage)`.  The shrinkage intensity is
`alpha = beta^2 / delta^2` with `delta^2 = ||S - mu I||_F^2` and
`beta^2 = (1/n^2) sum_k ||x_k||^4 - (1/n) ||S||_F^2` clipped to
`[0, delta^2]` (Ledoit & Wolf 2004).  Matches
`sklearn.covariance.ledoit_wolf`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:ledoit_wolf -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `X` | `Float` | `n` × `p` | — | — |
| `assume_centered` | `bool` | — | `False` | — |

**Returns** `Tuple[Float[Array, 'p p'], Float[Array, '']]`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:ledoit_wolf -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
